debug_info.goal:
x T : ℝ
hx : x > exp 50
hodd : ∃ X, Odd X ∧ x = X / 2
hT : T ∈ Set.Ioo 50 x
⊢ Eψ x ≤ (riemannZeta.zeroes_sum (Set.Ioo 0 1) (Set.Ioo (-T) T) fun ρ => ‖↑x ^ (ρ - 1) / ρ‖) + 2 * log x ^ 2 / T

failed_attempts: hx hodd hT

have hx' : 1 < x := (Real.exp_lt_exp.mpr (by norm_num)).trans hx
  have hT' : 1 ≤ T := le_of_lt (lt_trans (by norm_num) hT.1)
  exact PrimeNumberTheoremAnd.ExplicitFormula.explicit_formula_bound hx' hT' hodd
exact riemannZeta.explicit_formula_bound_half_odd hx hodd hT

have hx_ge_2 : 2 ≤ x := by
    refine le_trans ?_ hx.le
    have : 2 < Real.exp 1 := lt_trans (by norm_num) Real.exp_one_gt_d9
    exact le_trans this.le (le_of_lt (Real.exp_lt_exp.mpr (by norm_num)))
  have hT_ge_2 : 2 ≤ T := by linarith [hT.1]
  exact PrimeNumberTheoremAnd.ExplicitFormula.explicit_formula x T hx_ge_2 hodd hT_ge_2 hT.2
exact riemannZeta.explicit_formula hx hodd hT

refine riemannZeta.psi_bound_half_odd ?_ hodd ?_ (le_of_lt hT.2)
  · calc 2 < 50 := by norm_num
      _ < Real.exp 50 := Real.lt_exp_self 50
      _ < x := hx
  · linarith [hT.1]

have hx₂ : 2 < x := calc
    2 < 50 := by norm_num
    _ < Real.exp 50 := Real.lt_exp_self 50
    _ < x := hx
  have hT₂ : 2 < T := calc
    2 < 50 := by norm_num
    _ < T := hT.1
  exact PrimeNumberTheoremAnd.ExplicitFormula.explicit_formula_bound hx₂ hT₂ hT.2 hodd

have hx : 50 < log x := Real.lt_log_iff_exp_lt.mpr hx
  exact riemannZeta.explicit_formula_estimate hx hodd hT

have hx₂ : 2 ≤ x := le_trans (by norm_num) hx.le
  have hT₂ : 2 ≤ T := le_trans (by norm_num) hT.1.le
  have hodd' : ∃ n : ℤ, x = n + 1 / 2 := by
    obtain ⟨X, ⟨k, rfl⟩, rfl⟩ := hodd
    use k
    field_simp
  exact ExplicitFormula.explicit_formula_estimate hx₂ hT₂ hT.2 hodd'

apply riemannZeta.explicit_formula
  · exact le_trans (by norm_num) hx.le
  · exact hodd
  · exact le_trans (by norm_num) hT.1.le
  · exact hT.2.le
exact riemannZeta.explicit_formula_bound hx hodd hT
exact PrimeNumberTheoremAnd.ExplicitFormula.psi_bound_half_odd x T hx hodd hT
exact ExplicitFormula.theorem_3_1 hx hodd hT.1 hT.2

have hx' : 1 < x := lt_trans (Real.one_lt_exp_iff.mpr (by norm_num)) hx
  exact explicit_formula hx' hodd (by linarith [hT.1]) hT.2.le

have hx' : 1 < x := lt_trans (Real.one_lt_exp_iff.mpr (by norm_num)) hx
  have hT' : 1 ≤ T := le_trans (by norm_num) (le_of_lt hT.1)
  exact PrimeNumberTheoremAnd.ExplicitFormula.explicit_formula hx' hodd hT'

have hx' : 1 < x := lt_trans (by rw [← Real.exp_zero]; exact Real.exp_lt_exp.mpr (by norm_num)) hx
  have hT' : 1 ≤ T := le_trans (by norm_num) (le_of_lt hT.1)
  convert PrimeNumberTheoremAnd.ExplicitFormula.explicit_formula hx' hodd hT'
  apply riemannZeta.zeroes_sum_congr_sigma
  intro ρ _
  simp only [Set.mem_Ioo, Set.mem_univ, iff_true, ρ.property.2]

have hx' : 2 ≤ x := by
    apply le_trans _ hx.le
    rw [← Real.exp_ln 2]
    apply Real.exp_le_exp.mpr
    norm_num
  have hT' : 2 ≤ T := by linarith [hT.1]
  exact explicit_formula_bound hx' hT' hodd
exact ExplicitFormula.psi_bound_FKS hx hodd hT

have hx_gt_1 : 1 < x := lt_trans (one_lt_exp_iff.mpr (by norm_num)) hx
  have hT_gt_1 : 1 < T := lt_trans (by norm_num) hT.1
  exact explicit_formula_half_odd hx_gt_1 hodd hT_gt_1 hT.2
KLN.explicit_formula hx hodd hT

have hx' : x ≥ 2 := by linarith [hx]
  have hT' : T ≥ 4 := by linarith [hT.1]
  exact ExplicitFormula.bound_for_half_odd_integer hx' hodd hT'
exact ExplicitFormula.explicit_formula_bound hx hodd hT

have hx' : 1 < x := lt_trans (exp_lt_exp.mpr (by norm_num)) hx
  have hT' : 1 ≤ T := le_of_lt (lt_trans (by norm_num) hT.1)
  exact explicit_formula hx' hodd hT'
exact ExplicitFormula.theorem_3_1 hx hodd hT

have hx' : 1 < x := by
    rw [← exp_zero]
    exact lt_trans (exp_lt_exp.mpr (by norm_num)) hx
  have hT' : 0 < T := lt_trans (by norm_num) hT.1
  exact ExplicitFormula.psi_bound_half_odd hx' hodd hT' hT.2
exact KLN.explicit_formula hx hodd hT
hx hodd hT
exact PrimeNumberTheoremAnd.ExplicitFormula.platt_trudgian_bound hx hodd hT

apply explicit_formula_estimate
  · linarith [hT.1, hT.2]
  · exact hodd
  · constructor <;> linarith [hT.1, hT.2]
hx hodd hT
exact PrimeNumberTheoremAnd.ExplicitFormula.explicit_formula_bound (by linarith [hT.1, hT.2]) (by linarith [hT.1]) hodd hT.2
exact ExplicitFormula.theorem_3_1 hx hodd hT
